title: Manufacturing Engineer - Reliance Industries - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Reliance Industries - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Industries is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Reliance Industries:
Reliance Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Industries!
